features: 【TORCHES LED SUPER BRIGHT 500000 LUMENS】: S1695 torch is equipped with an upgraded 2025 XHM77.2 chip and the light source is much more stable. Since the light penetration is stronger than other lamp beads', its beam can pass through the dust and fog well, comparable to car fog lamps, especially suitable for foggy and rainy days with low visibility. It can easily illuminate an 2160-square-foot room or focus on objects up to 3937 feet away. The led torch is the best gift for friends and family.

【LCD POWER DISPLAY | RECHARGEBALE TORCH | USB OUTPUT】: This led torch rechargeable has been newly upgraded with unique LCD power percentage display. At a glance, you can always grasp the remaining power. Besides, this torches battery powered has been completely improved to shorten the charging time and extend the service life, providing up to 16 hours (Low mode) of powerful, non-diminishing brightness. With usb interface, It's more convenient to charge. It can also charge the phone in emergency.

【UPGRADED 5 MODE & ZOOMABLE】: S1695 flashlight's brightness of 5 modes(High/Medium/Low/Strobe/SOS) changes gradually instead of changing instantly, which can avoid the sudden irritation to the eye, therefore it can protect our eyes. The smooth current transition system can also better protect high power torch components, thus extending the service life. We can stretch the head to change the focal length and beam size, it has more powerful long range in spotlight and a wider field in floodlight.

【BRIGHT COB SMALL TORCH】: This powerful torch has a new upgraded accessory-COB keychain flash light, weighting 45g, very convenient to carry. Emit up to 800 lumens of light, it was brighter than most of torches. This flashlight torch has a strong magnet on the back, the magnetic design allows you to attach the lamp to any metal, and the 180-degree foldable handle allows you to set up the lamp at different angles or hang it in specific locations, which can free your hands.

【IP67 WATERPROOF & PRACTICALLY INDESTRUCTIBLE】: Shadowhawk S1695 tactical torch is made of aviation grade aluminum alloy, which is durable and not easy to be rusted. The strong fuselage means excellent shock resistance (up to 10 feet impact) or even ran over by a 5 tons truck, it still works! Built-in high tenacity seal rubber waterproof ring, the light rain and fog is not a problem. Moreover it can steadily guard you in the harsh environment, Perfect for dog walking, camping, hunting etc.

【UPGRADED GREAT VALUE LED TORCH KIT】: What you will get : 1x Shadowhawk S1695 super bright torch, 1x COB Small Flashlight, 1x Powerful battery and USB charging cable, 3x AAA Batteries, 1x Lanyard and holster, 1x Manual and Gift box. You will be pleasantly surprised by the brightness, quality, longevity and performance of the high powered torch. If you have any questions about this hand torch, please feel free to contact us. We will be happy to answer your questions.
description: Product Description Shadowhawk S1695 LED Torch with LCD Digital Display and COB Keychain Mini Torch Shadowhawk S1695 torch is equipped with an upgraded XHM77.2 chip and the light source is much more stable. It can easily illuminate an 2160-square-foot room or focus on objects up to 3937 feet away. The led torch is the best gift for friends and family. 2 In 1 Rechargeable Torch with LCD Digital Display and Large Capacity Battery Previous page Next page S1695 rechargeable torch features a 5000mAh battery delivering 16-hour runtime (low-brightness mode). Its LCD digital display shows real-time power in precise 1% increments (100%→99%→98%), replacing inaccurate 4-level indicators – ensuring exact capacity tracking, ideal for outdoor and emergency. Upgraded Accessory - Multifunctional COB Keychain Mini LED Torch Comes with a COB keychain mini torch with dual-function design: High-strength magnetic base attaches securely to metal surfaces, while the 180° foldable handle enables hands-free positioning at any angle or suspended mounting –perfect for mechanical repairs, camping setup, and emergency maintenance. Previous page Next page 1 Floodlight - Wide Beam 2 Spotlight - Narrow Beam 3 5 Lighting Modes Upgraded 30W XHM77.2 LED-Chip Previous page Next page Equipped with 30W XHM77.2 LED-Chip and high-transmittance lens, the brightness is 200% higher than other basic LED-Chip. IP67 Waterproof and Extremely Robust IPX7 WATERPROOF Built-in high tenacity seal rubber waterproof ring, the light rain and fog is not a problem. SUPER HEAT DISSIPATION Adopts multi-layer cutting design, which greatly increases the heat dissipation area and has excellent heat dissipation ability. IMPACT RESISTANCE Shadowhawk S1695 tactical torch is made of aviation grade aluminum alloy, which is durable and not easy to be rusted. RESIST COMPRESSION The strong fuselage means excellent shock resistance (up to 10 feet impact) or even ran over by a 5 tons truck, it still works! Shadowhawk S1695 Torch for Dog Walking, Camping, Hiking, Outdoor, Emergency Previous page Next page Package Includes: 1 X Shadowhawk S1695 Torch with Holster, Lanyard, and Instruction Manual 1 X COB Keychain Work Light 1 X Rechargeable Batteries, Usb-C Charging Cable and AAA Battery and AAA Battery Holder and Plastic Battery Tube
